description_long: This object is a long, slender loaf of bread, resembling a classic French baguette. Its crust is golden brown with a slightly uneven, rustic finish and visible scoring marks along the top, indicating traditional baking techniques. The surface appears matte with a few lighter patches, suggesting a dusting of flour before baking. The ends are tapered, and the loaf maintains a consistent cylindrical shape throughout its length. The bread's texture looks firm on the outside, with a likely soft and airy interior typical of artisan loaves. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A long, golden-brown baguette with a rustic, scored crust and tapered ends, showing a traditional artisan bread appearance.
description_view_0: The bread is seen from the side, showing its full length and the gentle curve of the crust with visible scoring.
description_view_1: The end view reveals the rounded, slightly domed tip and the cross-section of the crust.
description_view_2: Another side view, displaying the opposite length of the loaf with a more pronounced golden-brown coloration.
description_view_3: The opposite end view, showing a more irregular, rustic finish and the rounded tip of the bread.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a rustic, golden-brown finish with visible diagonal scoring marks along the top. There are lighter patches from flour dusting and a slightly uneven, artisanal texture.
